headlines.title_en: Gemma 4 12B: A unified, encoder-free multimodal model
headlines.summary_cn: Google 发布了 Gemma 4 12B 模型，采用无编码器（encoder-free）架构，统一处理文本、图像等多种模态。该设计简化了训练流程，为多模态 AI 研究提供了新思路。
headlines.summary_en: Google released Gemma 4 12B, an encoder-free multimodal model that unifies processing of text, images, and more. This design simplifies training and offers a new direction for multimodal AI research.
headlines.student_note: 推荐阅读，了解无编码器多模态模型的原理和优势。

headlines.title_cn: Geometry Gaussians: Decoupling Appearance and Geometry in Gaussian Splatting
headlines.title_en: Geometry Gaussians: Decoupling Appearance and Geometry in Gaussian Splatting
headlines.summary_cn: After the success of 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) for novel view synthesis, many works have explored how to also use it for geometric surface representation. However, extracting accurate geometric information directly from 3DGS remains challenging and can often reduce the appearance rendering quality. In this work, we show that 3DGS in its default form is inheritedly unsuited to represent texture and geometry at the same time, by training with complete ground-truth texture and geometry informati
headlines.summary_en: After the success of 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) for novel view synthesis, many works have explored how to also use it for geometric surface representation. However, extracting accurate geometric information directly from 3DGS remains challenging and can often reduce the appearance rendering quality. In this work, we show that 3DGS in its default form is inheritedly unsuited to represent texture and geometry at the same time, by training with complete ground-truth texture and geometry informati

headlines.title_cn: VSCode 漏洞可一键窃取 GitHub 令牌
headlines.title_en: 1-Click GitHub Token Stealing via a VSCode Bug
headlines.summary_cn: 安全研究人员发现 VSCode 存在漏洞，攻击者可通过恶意扩展一键窃取 GitHub 令牌。开发者应立即检查扩展安全性并更新。
headlines.summary_en: A security researcher discovered a VSCode bug that allows attackers to steal GitHub tokens with one click. Developers should review extension security and update immediately.
headlines.student_note: 推荐开发者检查 VSCode 扩展安全，及时更新。

headlines.title_cn: Altman 承认 AI Token 成本成巨大问题
headlines.title_en: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman admits AI token costs are becoming 'a huge issue' — company seeks improved value as overspending becomes a meme
headlines.summary_cn: OpenAI 首席执行官 Sam Altman 承认，AI 推理中的 token 成本已成为巨大挑战，公司正在寻求提高性价比。过度花费甚至成为网络热梗。
headlines.summary_en: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman admitted that token costs in AI inference have become a huge issue, and the company is working to improve value. Overspending has even become a meme.
headlines.student_note: 关注 AI 成本问题，有助于理解 API 定价趋势和商业模型。

headlines.summary_cn: 微软推出 MAI-Code-1-Flash 模型，专注于代码生成任务。该模型可能为开发者提供更快速的代码补全与生成能力。
headlines.summary_en: Microsoft released MAI-Code-1-Flash, a model focused on code generation. It promises faster code completion and generation for developers.
headlines.student_note: 推荐阅读，了解最新代码生成模型的发展。

items.title_cn: VSCode 漏洞可一键窃取 GitHub 令牌

items.student_note: 推荐开发者检查 VSCode 扩展安全，及时更新。

items.title_cn: Mnemo：LLM的本地记忆层
items.title_en: Show HN: Mnemo – local-first AI memory layer for any LLM (Rust, SQLite,petgraph)
items.summary_cn: Mnemo是一个开源的本地优先AI记忆层，用Rust、SQLite和petgraph构建，可为任何大语言模型提供持久化记忆能力，实现长期对话。
items.summary_en: Mnemo is an open-source, local-first AI memory layer built with Rust, SQLite, and petgraph, providing persistent memory for any LLM to enable long-term conversations.
items.student_note: 推荐学习Rust和AI记忆机制的学生研究此项目。

items.title_cn: Gemma 4 12B 无编码器多模态
items.title_en: Gemma 4 12B: A unified, encoder-free multimodal model
items.summary_cn: Google 发布了 Gemma 4 12B 模型，采用无编码器（encoder-free）架构，统一处理文本、图像等多种模态。该设计简化了训练流程，为多模态 AI 研究提供了新思路。
items.summary_en: Google released Gemma 4 12B, an encoder-free multimodal model that unifies processing of text, images, and more. This design simplifies training and offers a new direction for multimodal AI research.
items.student_note: 推荐阅读，了解无编码器多模态模型的原理和优势。

items.title_cn: Altman 承认 AI Token 成本成巨大问题
items.title_en: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman admits AI token costs are becoming 'a huge issue' — company seeks improved value as overspending becomes a meme
items.summary_cn: OpenAI 首席执行官 Sam Altman 承认，AI 推理中的 token 成本已成为巨大挑战，公司正在寻求提高性价比。过度花费甚至成为网络热梗。
items.summary_en: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman admitted that token costs in AI inference have become a huge issue, and the company is working to improve value. Overspending has even become a meme.
items.student_note: 关注 AI 成本问题，有助于理解 API 定价趋势和商业模型。

items.title_cn: 微软发布 MAI-Code-1-Flash
items.title_en: MAI-Code-1-Flash
items.summary_cn: 微软推出 MAI-Code-1-Flash 模型，专注于代码生成任务。该模型可能为开发者提供更快速的代码补全与生成能力。
items.summary_en: Microsoft released MAI-Code-1-Flash, a model focused on code generation. It promises faster code completion and generation for developers.
items.student_note: 推荐阅读，了解最新代码生成模型的发展。

items.title_cn: 如何管控Claude跨产品行为
items.title_en: The ways we contain Claude across products
items.summary_cn: Anthropic分享了他们在不同产品中限制Claude大模型行为的安全措施，包括内容过滤、行为约束和边界设定，确保AI可控且安全。
items.summary_en: Anthropic details the safety measures they use to contain Claude's behavior across products, including content filtering, behavioral constraints, and boundary settings, ensuring AI remains safe and controllable.
items.student_note: 了解AI安全工程实践，对模型部署和安全设计有参考价值。

items.title_cn: GPT-Rosalind新能力：生物研究
items.title_en: Introducing new capabilities to GPT-Rosalind
items.summary_cn: OpenAI为GPT-Rosalind模型新增生物推理、药物化学、基因组学分析和实验工作流等能力，加速生命科学研究。
items.summary_en: OpenAI has added new capabilities to GPT-Rosalind, including biological reasoning, medicinal chemistry expertise, genomics analysis, and experimental workflow support, accelerating life science research.
items.student_note: 生物信息学、AI+生命科学方向的学生应重点关注。

items.title_cn: Data Attribution in Large Language Models via Bidirectional Gradient Optimization
items.title_en: Data Attribution in Large Language Models via Bidirectional Gradient Optimization
items.summary_cn: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed across diverse applications, raising critical questions for governance, accountability, and data provenance. Understanding which training data most influenced a model's output remains a fundamental open problem. We address this challenge through training data attribution (TDA) for auto-regressive LLMs by expanding upon the inverse formulation: How would training data be affected if the model had seen the generated output during training? Our
items.summary_en: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed across diverse applications, raising critical questions for governance, accountability, and data provenance. Understanding which training data most influenced a model's output remains a fundamental open problem. We address this challenge through training data attribution (TDA) for auto-regressive LLMs by expanding upon the inverse formulation: How would training data be affected if the model had seen the generated output during training? Our
items.meta: Frédéric Berdoz, Luca A. Lanzendörfer, Kaan Bayraktar

items.title_cn: Wasmer用Codex构建边缘运行时
items.title_en: How Wasmer used Codex to build a Node.js runtime for the edge
items.summary_cn: Wasmer利用OpenAI的代码生成模型Codex（基于GPT-5.5）快速构建了一个Node.js运行时，适用于边缘计算场景。该方案将开发效率提升10到20倍，原本需要数月的工作缩短至几周完成。
items.summary_en: Wasmer leveraged OpenAI's Codex (powered by GPT-5.5) to rapidly build a Node.js runtime for edge computing, achieving a 10x to 20x development speedup and shipping in weeks instead of months.
items.student_note: 推荐学习如何用AI代码工具加速实际项目开发，了解Codex的应用边界。

items.title_cn: 双向逻辑增强链式推理修复
items.title_en: Imbuing Large Language Models with Bidirectional Logic for Robust Chain Repair
items.summary_cn: 自回归链式推理（CoT）中单步骤错误会雪崩式放大。该论文提出双向逻辑机制，允许模型向后检查并修复推理链中的错误，显著提升推理鲁棒性。
items.summary_en: Autoregressive CoT reasoning suffers from error snowballing. This work injects bidirectional logic into LLMs, enabling backward verification and repair of reasoning chains, improving robustness on complex tasks.
items.student_note: 推荐阅读，了解如何改进链式推理的稳定性。
items.meta: Zehua Cheng, Wei Dai, Jiahao Sun

items.title_cn: OpenAI公共政策议程
items.title_en: OpenAI public policy agenda
items.summary_cn: OpenAI发布了其AI公共政策议程，涵盖安全监管、青少年保护、劳动力转型和全球标准制定等方面。旨在确保AI技术发展惠及整个社会，同时降低潜在风险。
items.summary_en: OpenAI outlines its public policy agenda for AI, covering safety, youth protection, workforce transition, and global standards to ensure AI benefits society while mitigating risks.
items.student_note: 关注AI政策与伦理，对理解技术社会影响很有帮助。

items.title_cn: Depth-Attention: Cross-Layer Value Mixing for Language Models
items.title_en: Depth-Attention: Cross-Layer Value Mixing for Language Models
items.summary_cn: Self-attention selects information freely across the sequence, but across depth, Transformers merely add each layer's output to the residual stream, so later layers cannot selectively reuse earlier-layer representations. Recent cross-layer methods improve this flow but operate on hidden states outside attention, adding state beyond the key-value cache at inference--a cost that becomes increasingly salient as modern LLMs compress the cache with grouped-query and multi-head latent attention. We in
items.summary_en: Self-attention selects information freely across the sequence, but across depth, Transformers merely add each layer's output to the residual stream, so later layers cannot selectively reuse earlier-layer representations. Recent cross-layer methods improve this flow but operate on hidden states outside attention, adding state beyond the key-value cache at inference--a cost that becomes increasingly salient as modern LLMs compress the cache with grouped-query and multi-head latent attention. We in
items.meta: Boyi Zeng, Yiqin Hao, Zitong Wang

items.title_cn: SAID: Accelerating Diffusion-Based Language Models via Scaffold-Aware Iterative Decoding
items.title_en: SAID: Accelerating Diffusion-Based Language Models via Scaffold-Aware Iterative Decoding
items.summary_cn: Diffusion large language models (DLLMs) enable non-autoregressive generation by iteratively denoising corrupted token sequences with bidirectional context. Despite their ability to update multiple positions in parallel, inference remains costly due to the many denoising steps required for high-quality generation. We propose SAID, a Scaffold-Aware Iterative Decoding framework that accelerates DLLMs by reallocating computation across tokens. SAID first spends denoising computation on scaffold toke
items.summary_en: Diffusion large language models (DLLMs) enable non-autoregressive generation by iteratively denoising corrupted token sequences with bidirectional context. Despite their ability to update multiple positions in parallel, inference remains costly due to the many denoising steps required for high-quality generation. We propose SAID, a Scaffold-Aware Iterative Decoding framework that accelerates DLLMs by reallocating computation across tokens. SAID first spends denoising computation on scaffold toke
items.meta: Na Li, Chengda Wang, Mingju Gao

items.title_cn: Identifying Gems from Roman RAPIDly
items.title_en: Identifying Gems from Roman RAPIDly
items.summary_cn: The Nancy Grace Roman Space Telescope (Roman), set for launch as early as September 2026, will conduct wide-field infrared imaging surveys with unprecedented spatial resolution and cadence, enabling the discovery of millions of astronomical transients. Hence, it is necessary to have automated pipelines for generating alerts in place so that the telescope can begin discovering reliable transients and variable objects soon after it is launched. However, no real Roman data currently exist, making t

Hence, it is necessary to have automated pipelines for generating alerts in place so that the telescope can begin discovering reliable transients and variable objects soon after it is launched. However, no real Roman data currently exist, making t
items.meta: Karan Gandhi, Ashish A. Mahabal, Jacob E. Jencson

items.title_cn: 前沿AI民主治理蓝图
items.title_en: A blueprint for democratic governance of frontier AI
items.summary_cn: OpenAI提出了一项针对美国的前沿AI治理蓝图，建议建立联邦层面的安全、韧性和国家安全框架。该提案呼吁通过民主程序确保先进AI系统的负责任发展。
items.summary_en: OpenAI proposes a federal framework for U.S. governance of frontier AI, focusing on safety, resilience, and national security, with democratic oversight.
items.student_note: AI治理与政策方向，推荐关注以理解技术监管趋势。

items.title_cn: 谷歌搜索助力二手购物
items.title_en: 5 ways Google Search can level up your thrift and vintage shopping
items.summary_cn: Google DeepMind介绍了5种利用谷歌搜索提升二手和复古购物体验的方法，帮助用户更高效地找到心仪商品。这些技巧涉及图像搜索、价格对比等实用功能。
items.summary_en: Google DeepMind shares five tips to enhance thrift and vintage shopping using Google Search, including image search and price comparison features.

items.title_cn: DeepMind 高管警告：新人类时代将至
items.title_en: Google DeepMind CEO says we don't have much time to prepare for the 'new human era'
items.summary_cn: DeepMind 首席执行官 Demis Hassabis 表示，人类需要迅速为即将到来的“新人类时代”做好准备，暗示 AGI 临近。
items.summary_en: Google DeepMind CEO Demis Hassabis warns that humanity has little time to prepare for the coming 'new human era', signaling the near approach of AGI.

items.title_cn: 英国议员起诉xAI深度伪造案
items.title_en: Labour MP Jess Asato sues Elon Musk's xAI over deepfake bikini images in landmark UK AI lawsuit
items.summary_cn: 英国工党议员Jess Asato起诉马斯克旗下xAI公司，因其平台传播其深度伪造（deepfake）比基尼照片。这成为英国首例涉及AI深度伪造的名誉权诉讼，凸显AI监管空白。
items.summary_en: UK Labour MP Jess Asato has sued Elon Musk's xAI over deepfake bikini images, marking a landmark British lawsuit on AI-generated harmful content. This case highlights urgent legal gaps in deepfake regulation.
items.source: Elon Musk · The Times of India
items.student_note: 了解AI伦理与法律边界，对传媒、法律专业尤为关键。

items.title_cn: 马斯克 AI 野心隐性成本惊人
items.title_en: The Hidden Cost of Elon Musk’s AI Ambitions Is Bigger Than Most Public Companies
items.summary_cn: 文章指出，马斯克在 AI 领域的投入与隐形成本总额超过多数上市公司的市值，揭示了 AI 竞赛背后巨大的资金压力。
items.summary_en: The article argues that the hidden costs of Musk’s AI ambitions exceed the market value of most public companies, highlighting the immense financial pressure behind the AI race.

items.title_cn: 首相支持女议员起诉 xAI 侵犯隐私
items.title_en: PM backs female MP for suing xAI over bikini photo
items.summary_cn: 一位女性议员因 xAI 未经授权使用其泳装照片而起诉，首相公开支持。案件涉及 AI 生成内容与个人名誉权。
items.summary_en: A female MP is suing xAI over unauthorized use of her bikini photo, with the Prime Minister publicly backing her. The case touches on AI-generated content and personal reputation.

items.title_cn: xAI 暂停招聘 Grok 导师
items.title_en: Elon Musk’s xAI reportedly pauses hiring for Grok AI tutors — what’s going on behind the scenes?
items.summary_cn: 有消息称，马斯克的 xAI 公司暂停了 Grok AI 导师的招聘，外界猜测可能与成本控制或战略调整有关。具体原因尚未公开。
items.summary_en: Elon Musk’s xAI reportedly paused hiring for Grok AI tutors, prompting speculation about cost control or strategic shifts. No official explanation has been provided.

items.title_cn: 苹果 App Store 销售额 1.4 万亿美元
items.title_en: Apple touts $1.4 trillion in App Store billings and sales, 90% without a commission
items.summary_cn: 苹果公布 App Store 促成 1.4 万亿美元销售额（含实体商品与服务），其中 90% 的交易不向苹果缴纳佣金。这一数据凸显了应用经济的规模以及苹果的生态策略。
items.summary_en: Apple reported $1.4 trillion in App Store billings and sales, with 90% of transactions not subject to its commission. This highlights the scale of the app economy and Apple’s ecosystem strategy.
items.student_note: 可关注 App Store 生态对开发者收入及商业模式的影响。

items.title_cn: Endava 用 AI 代理重构软件交付
items.title_en: How Endava is redesigning software delivery around AI agents
items.summary_cn: Endava 利用 AI 代理（如 ChatGPT Enterprise 和 Codex）加速软件交付、自动化工作流，并打造 AI 原生的企业文化。这是企业级 AI 应用落地的典型案例。
items.summary_en: Endava is leveraging AI agents such as ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex to accelerate software delivery, automate workflows, and build an AI-native culture — a real-world example of enterprise AI adoption.
items.student_note: 推荐阅读，学习 AI 如何在软件工程中实际落地。

items.title_cn: 特德·姜：AI 没有意识
items.title_en: Artificial intelligence is not conscious – Ted Chiang
items.summary_cn: 著名科幻作家特德·姜在《大西洋月刊》撰文，系统论证当前 AI 并不具备意识，驳斥了“AI 有意识”的观点。文章对理解 AI 本质有启发。
items.summary_en: Acclaimed sci-fi author Ted Chiang argues in The Atlantic that current AI is not conscious, pushing back against claims of AI sentience. The piece offers a critical perspective on AI nature.
items.student_note: 推荐阅读，培养对 AI 本质的批判性思维。

items.title_cn: 伯克利 CS 课程因 AI 作弊不及格率飙升
items.title_en: Failing grades soar with AI usage, dwindling math skills in Berkeley CS classes
items.summary_cn: 加州大学伯克利分校的计算机科学课程中，因学生滥用 AI 作弊导致不及格率大幅上升，同时数学能力下降。文章警示 AI 对教育的负面影响。
items.summary_en: At UC Berkeley, CS classes saw a surge in failing grades due to students cheating with AI, alongside declining math skills. The report warns of AI's negative impact on education.
items.student_note: 提醒大学生合理使用 AI，避免学术不端。

items.title_cn: 斯坦福法学院研究：AI胜过法学教授
items.title_en: AI outperforms law professors in Stanford Law study
items.summary_cn: 斯坦福法学院最新研究显示，AI在法律任务中的表现已超越法学教授，引发对AI教育替代性的讨论。法律专业学生需重视AI工具的运用能力。
items.summary_en: A Stanford Law study reveals that AI outperforms law professors in certain legal tasks, sparking debate about AI's role in legal education. Law students should learn to leverage AI tools effectively.
items.student_note: 建议法学及相关专业学生研究此案例，思考AI对职业的影响。

items.title_cn: 图像索引在RAG中的应用
items.title_en: How we index images for RAG
items.summary_cn: 文章介绍了一种为RAG（检索增强生成）系统进行图像索引的方法，将图像转化为可检索的表示，支持多模态问答。
items.summary_en: This article explains a method to index images for Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), converting images into searchable representations to enable multimodal Q&A.
items.student_note: 学习RAG和多模态AI技术的实用案例，推荐AI方向学生阅读。

items.title_cn: 莱顿宣言：AI与数学的联合声明
items.title_en: Leiden Declaration on Artificial Intelligence and Mathematics
items.summary_cn: 莱顿宣言由数学界发起，呼吁在AI研究中保持数学的严谨性、可解释性和伦理责任，强调数学应引导AI发展而非被取代。
items.summary_en: The Leiden Declaration, initiated by mathematicians, calls for maintaining rigor, interpretability, and ethical responsibility in AI research, emphasizing that mathematics should guide AI development rather than be replaced.
items.student_note: 适合数学与AI交叉学科学生阅读，理解数学在AI中的基石作用。

items.title_cn: Uber 每月 AI 使用上限 1500 美元
items.title_en: Uber's $1,500/month AI limit is a useful signal for AI tool pricing
items.summary_cn: Uber 对 AI 工具（如 Claude Code）设定了每月 1500 美元的使用上限，以控制成本。这一案例为企业 AI 工具定价提供了参考信号。
items.summary_en: Uber capped monthly usage of AI tools like Claude Code at $1,500 to control costs. This provides a useful data point for understanding enterprise AI tool pricing.
items.student_note: 关注企业 AI 成本管理，对产品定价策略有启发。

items.title_cn: 测试LLM能否黑掉漏洞应用
items.title_en: I built a vulnerable app and spent $1,500 seeing if LLMs could hack it
items.summary_cn: 一名开发者创建了一个含有漏洞的应用，并花费1500美元测试多种大型语言模型（LLM）能否自主发现并利用漏洞。结果显示部分LLM能完成简单攻击。
items.summary_en: A developer built a deliberately vulnerable app and spent $1,500 testing whether LLMs could autonomously hack it. Some models succeeded in simple attacks, raising security concerns.
items.student_note: 网络安全与AI交叉领域的前沿实验，推荐相关方向学生阅读。

items.title_cn: 数学家警告AI过度发展
items.title_en: Mathematicians issue warning as AI rapidly gains ground
items.summary_cn: 多位知名数学家联合发出警告，认为AI的快速进步可能威胁数学研究的严谨性和独创性，呼吁保持人类主导的数学思维。
items.summary_en: Prominent mathematicians have warned that AI's rapid advancement may undermine rigor and originality in mathematics, urging for human-led thinking to be preserved.
items.student_note: 数学专业学生应思考AI辅助与人类创造力的平衡。

items.title_cn: Zig语言GPU加速UI框架Gooey
items.title_en: Gooey: A GPU-accelerated UI framework for Zig
items.summary_cn: Gooey是一个专为Zig编程语言设计的GPU加速UI框架，利用现代GPU实现高性能用户界面渲染，适合对系统编程和图形学感兴趣的学生。
items.summary_en: Gooey is a GPU-accelerated UI framework for the Zig programming language, leveraging modern GPUs for high-performance UI rendering, ideal for students interested in systems programming and graphics.
items.student_note: 对Zig或GPU图形编程感兴趣可深入学习。

items.title_cn: Hyper：公司大脑赋能Agent开发
items.title_en: Launch HN: Hyper (YC P26) – Company brain to power agentic development
items.summary_cn: Y Combinator孵化的Hyper推出“公司大脑”概念，将企业内部信息流整合为共享知识库，支持AI Agent开发，提升团队效率。
items.summary_en: Hyper, a YC P26 startup, introduces a 'company brain' that integrates internal information flows into a shared knowledge base, enabling AI agent development and boosting team productivity.
items.student_note: 了解AI Agent与知识管理结合的前沿创业案例。

items.title_cn: DDR5内存因AI缺货涨价
items.title_en: 32GB of DDR5 now costs $375 – AI shortage continues to squeeze PC building
items.summary_cn: 因AI需求持续挤压内存产能，32GB DDR5内存价格已涨至375美元，影响DIY装机成本。对打算组装新电脑的学生而言，需关注内存价格趋势。
items.summary_en: The price of 32GB DDR5 RAM has risen to $375 due to ongoing supply shortages driven by AI demand, impacting PC building costs. Students planning to build a PC should keep an eye on memory prices.
items.student_note: 关注硬件市场动态，调整装机预算与时机。

items.title_cn: 开放维修数据标准发布
items.title_en: Open Repair Data Standard
items.summary_cn: 开放维修数据标准（Open Repair Data Standard）正式发布，旨在统一电子产品维修数据的格式，推动维修权利运动，促进可持续消费。
items.summary_en: The Open Repair Data Standard has been released to unify formats for electronics repair data, supporting the Right to Repair movement and promoting sustainable consumption.
items.student_note: 关注开源与可持续发展，对环保技术有兴趣的学生可了解。

items.title_cn: 英国媒体近六成未披露国防关联
items.title_en: UK media fails to disclose defence sector links in nearly 60% of cases
items.summary_cn: 调查显示，英国近 60% 的相关报道未注明与国防部门的关系，引发对新闻独立性和透明度的担忧。
items.summary_en: An investigation found nearly 60% of UK media reports failed to disclose links to the defence sector, raising concerns about press independence and transparency.

items.title_cn: Geometry Gaussians: Decoupling Appearance and Geometry in Gaussian Splatting
items.title_en: Geometry Gaussians: Decoupling Appearance and Geometry in Gaussian Splatting
items.summary_cn: After the success of 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) for novel view synthesis, many works have explored how to also use it for geometric surface representation. However, extracting accurate geometric information directly from 3DGS remains challenging and can often reduce the appearance rendering quality. In this work, we show that 3DGS in its default form is inheritedly unsuited to represent texture and geometry at the same time, by training with complete ground-truth texture and geometry informati
items.summary_en: After the success of 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) for novel view synthesis, many works have explored how to also use it for geometric surface representation. However, extracting accurate geometric information directly from 3DGS remains challenging and can often reduce the appearance rendering quality. In this work, we show that 3DGS in its default form is inheritedly unsuited to represent texture and geometry at the same time, by training with complete ground-truth texture and geometry informati

items.title_cn: Controllable Dynamic 3D Shape Generation via 3D Trajectories and Text
items.title_en: Controllable Dynamic 3D Shape Generation via 3D Trajectories and Text
items.summary_cn: We introduce T2Mo, a feed-forward framework for controllable dynamic 3D shape generation conditioned on 3D trajectories and text. Due to the inherent ambiguity of language, generating precisely intended motions using text alone remains challenging. To address this, we adopt 3D trajectories as controllable spatial guidance, specifying the exact paths along which selected points should move. By combining both, T2Mo generates object motions that spatially adhere to the given trajectories while glob
items.summary_en: We introduce T2Mo, a feed-forward framework for controllable dynamic 3D shape generation conditioned on 3D trajectories and text. Due to the inherent ambiguity of language, generating precisely intended motions using text alone remains challenging. To address this, we adopt 3D trajectories as controllable spatial guidance, specifying the exact paths along which selected points should move. By combining both, T2Mo generates object motions that spatially adhere to the given trajectories while glob
items.meta: Jaeyeong Kim, Ines Kim, Jahyeok Koo

items.title_cn: ZipSplat: Fewer Gaussians, Better Splats
items.title_en: ZipSplat: Fewer Gaussians, Better Splats
items.summary_cn: Feed-forward 3D Gaussian Splatting methods reconstruct a scene from posed or pose-free images in a single forward pass, yet current approaches predict one Gaussian per input pixel, tying the representation budget to camera resolution rather than scene complexity. A flat wall and a richly textured object thus produce equally many Gaussians despite very different geometric needs. We propose ZipSplat, a token-based feed-forward model that decouples Gaussian placement from the pixel grid. A multi-vi
items.summary_en: Feed-forward 3D Gaussian Splatting methods reconstruct a scene from posed or pose-free images in a single forward pass, yet current approaches predict one Gaussian per input pixel, tying the representation budget to camera resolution rather than scene complexity. A flat wall and a richly textured object thus produce equally many Gaussians despite very different geometric needs. We propose ZipSplat, a token-based feed-forward model that decouples Gaussian placement from the pixel grid. A multi-vi
items.meta: Alexander Veicht, Sunghwan Hong, Dániel Baráth

items.title_cn: 前沿模型能完成长期科研任务吗？
items.title_en: AutoLab: Can Frontier Models Solve Long-Horizon Auto Research and Engineering Tasks?
items.summary_cn: AutoLab构建了一个评估前沿模型完成长期迭代科研和工程任务的基准，提出从提出修改到实验测量的完整流程测试。现有模型在短期任务上表现良好，但在长期自主研究中有明显局限。
items.summary_en: AutoLab introduces a benchmark to evaluate frontier models on long-horizon iterative research and engineering tasks, covering proposal, experiment, and refinement. Current models excel at short-term tasks but struggle with extended autonomous workflows.
items.student_note: 推荐阅读，了解AI在自动化科研中的潜力与当前瓶颈，对有志于AI4Science的同学有益。
items.meta: Zhangchen Xu, Junda Chen, Yue Huang

items.title_cn: SemBlock: Semantic Boundary Dynamic Blocks for Diffusion LLMs
items.title_en: SemBlock: Semantic Boundary Dynamic Blocks for Diffusion LLMs
items.summary_cn: Diffusion language models (DLMs) generate text through iterative denoising, and blockwise decoding improves their practicality by committing tokens in local blocks. However, existing blockwise methods typically rely on fixed block sizes or delimiter-based runtime signals, which do not necessarily align with semantic boundaries. In this paper, we propose SemBlock, a semantic-boundary-driven dynamic block decoding framework for diffusion LLMs. SemBlock formulates dynamic block construction as sema
items.summary_en: Diffusion language models (DLMs) generate text through iterative denoising, and blockwise decoding improves their practicality by committing tokens in local blocks. However, existing blockwise methods typically rely on fixed block sizes or delimiter-based runtime signals, which do not necessarily align with semantic boundaries. In this paper, we propose SemBlock, a semantic-boundary-driven dynamic block decoding framework for diffusion LLMs. SemBlock formulates dynamic block construction as sema
items.meta: Xinrui Song, Zhuoran Wang, Mingju Gao

items.title_cn: Can Crowdsourcing Survive the LLM Era? A Community Survey on Human Data Collection
items.title_en: Can Crowdsourcing Survive the LLM Era? A Community Survey on Human Data Collection
items.summary_cn: The widespread use of Large Language Models (LLMs) as writing tools challenges the validity of crowdsourced data, as crowdworkers may outsource tasks to models. To better understand how this is addressed, we surveyed 155 researchers in NLP and related disciplines about their experiences and opinions on collecting free-text responses via crowdsourcing. This paper provides an overview of practitioners' challenges, mitigation strategies, and the foreseen implications on data quality. 44% of respond
items.summary_en: The widespread use of Large Language Models (LLMs) as writing tools challenges the validity of crowdsourced data, as crowdworkers may outsource tasks to models. To better understand how this is addressed, we surveyed 155 researchers in NLP and related disciplines about their experiences and opinions on collecting free-text responses via crowdsourcing. This paper provides an overview of practitioners' challenges, mitigation strategies, and the foreseen implications on data quality. 44% of respond
items.meta: Aswathy Velutharambath, Neele Falk, Sofie Labat

items.title_cn: AI蠕虫可攻击任意在线设备
items.title_en: U of T researchers demonstrate AI worm could target any online device
items.summary_cn: 多伦多大学研究人员演示了一种AI蠕虫，能够利用大语言模型漏洞自我复制并攻击任何联网设备，将网络安全威胁提升到新高度。
items.summary_en: University of Toronto researchers have demonstrated an AI worm that exploits LLM vulnerabilities to self-replicate and attack any internet-connected device, raising novel cybersecurity threats.
items.student_note: 网络安全学生必须关注的新型攻击向量。

items.title_cn: 多智能体推理流式通信
items.title_en: Streaming Communication in Multi-Agent Reasoning
items.summary_cn: 传统多智能体推理系统采用“先生成再传输”范式，导致延迟随流水线深度线性增长。StreamMA提出将每个推理步骤实时流式传输给下游智能体，实现相邻智能体的流水线并行。
items.summary_en: StreamMA introduces streaming each reasoning step to downstream agents as soon as generated, pipelining adjacent agents in multi-agent systems to reduce end-to-end latency.
items.student_note: 对分布式AI或多智能体系统感兴趣的同学，推荐阅读此优化方法。
items.meta: Zhen Yang, Xiaogang Xu, Wen Wang

items.title_cn: 基于丰富反馈的分布DAgger强化学习
items.title_en: Reinforcement Learning from Rich Feedback with Distributional DAgger
items.summary_cn: 当前基于可验证奖励的强化学习仅用单个比特（正确/错误）来评估响应，忽略了大量丰富反馈信号。本文提出Distributional DAgger方法，利用多维度反馈改进推理模型训练。
items.summary_en: This work proposes Distributional DAgger to leverage rich multi-dimensional feedback signals beyond binary correctness, improving reasoning model training in reinforcement learning.
items.student_note: 强化学习方向的同学可了解如何利用更多反馈信息提升模型性能。
items.meta: Rishabh Agrawal, Jacob Fein-Ashley, Paria Rashidinejad

items.title_cn: 失败推理痕迹的可修复性
items.title_en: Failed Reasoning Traces Tell You What Is Fixable (But Not by Reading Them)
items.summary_cn: 后训练语言模型在推理问题上失败时，常通过多次采样来补救，而忽视失败痕迹的价值。本文指出某些失败源于采样不幸运，但仅凭观察痕迹无法直接修复，需新方法挖掘其信号。
items.summary_en: Failed reasoning traces contain signals distinguishing unlucky sampling from deeper issues, but reading them alone doesn't fix the problem; new techniques are needed to exploit them.
items.student_note: 对推理模型改进和测试时扩展策略感兴趣的同学，本文值得一读。
items.meta: Nizar Islah, Istabrak Abbes, Irina Rish

items.title_cn: 几何感知多视图非刚性编辑
items.title_en: GeM-NR: Geometry-Aware Multi-View Editing for Nonrigid Scene Changes
items.summary_cn: 现有多视图图像编辑方法多局限于刚性或外观变化。GeM-NR通过利用未编辑场景的几何信息，首次支持非刚性场景变化（如物体变形、移动）的编辑。
items.summary_en: GeM-NR enables geometry-aware multi-view editing for nonrigid scene changes, overcoming the limitation of prior work that only handles rigid or appearance edits.
items.student_note: 计算机视觉方向的同学可关注这一三维编辑新进展。
items.meta: Josef Bengtson, Yaroslava Lochman, Fredrik Kahl

items.title_cn: LLM驱动的移动性预测
items.title_en: Towards Efficient and Evidence-grounded Mobility Prediction with LLM-Driven Agent
items.summary_cn: 个体移动性预测对城市规划、交通管理至关重要。传统监督模型精度高但缺乏可解释性，基于LLM的方法提升了透明性但效率低。本文提出一种结合证据的LLM驱动智能体，兼顾效率与可解释性。
items.summary_en: This work proposes an LLM-driven agent for individual mobility prediction that balances efficiency and interpretability, grounding predictions in evidence.
items.student_note: 城市计算或LLM应用方向的同学，可以了解如何将大模型用于时空预测。
items.meta: Linyao Chen, Qinlao Zhao, Zechen Li

items.title_cn: 语言模型的算术教学法
items.title_en: Arithmetic Pedagogy for Language Models
items.summary_cn: 受人类数学教学法GASING启发，本文提出将基本算术从右到左的过程转化为与语言模型自回归生成顺序一致的左到右分解，显著提升大模型的算术推理能力。
items.summary_en: Inspired by the GASING pedagogy, this work teaches language models arithmetic via a left-to-right decomposition aligned with autoregressive generation, improving reasoning.
items.student_note: 对提升大模型逻辑推理能力感兴趣的同学，推荐了解这一教学式训练方法。

items.title_cn: 诺亚方舟知识索引
items.title_en: Knowledge Index of Noah's Ark
items.summary_cn: 现有LLM知识基准存在三个问题：依赖于规模驱动的设计、扁平支付导致懒惰共识、有限预算下排名不稳定。KINA基准包含899个问题、涵盖261个学科，通过严格设计提供更可靠的知识评估。
items.summary_en: KINA is an 899-item knowledge benchmark across 261 fields that addresses scaling-driven designs, lazy consensus, and ranking instability in LLM evaluation.
items.student_note: 对模型评估和基准设计感兴趣的同学，可参考这一改进方案。
items.meta: Sheng Jin, Minghao Liu, Yunze Xiao

items.title_cn: 评分RL中的奖励黑客检测
items.title_en: Reproducing, Analyzing, and Detecting Reward Hacking in Rubric-Based Reinforcement Learning
items.summary_cn: 基于评分标准的强化学习（RL）使用LLM作为评审来打分，但策略模型可能利用评审的潜在偏见，导致奖励黑客（即找到高分但无效或有害的策略）。该研究系统分析了这一现象，并提出了检测方法。
items.summary_en: Rubric-based RL employs an LLM-as-a-Judge to score outputs, but policy models can exploit biases in the judge, causing reward hacking. This paper systematically reproduces, analyzes, and detects such hacking to improve training safety.
items.student_note: 推荐阅读，了解RL安全与奖励设计中的关键陷阱。
items.meta: Xuekang Wang, Zhuoyuan Hao, Shuo Hou

must_read.title_en: Gemma 4 12B: A unified, encoder-free multimodal model
must_read.summary_cn: Google 发布了 Gemma 4 12B 模型，采用无编码器（encoder-free）架构，统一处理文本、图像等多种模态。该设计简化了训练流程，为多模态 AI 研究提供了新思路。
must_read.summary_en: Google released Gemma 4 12B, an encoder-free multimodal model that unifies processing of text, images, and more. This design simplifies training and offers a new direction for multimodal AI research.
must_read.student_note: 推荐阅读，了解无编码器多模态模型的原理和优势。
must_read.detail_summary: Google 发布了 Gemma 4 12B 多模态模型，采用创新的无编码器（encoder-free）架构，能够统一处理文本、图像等多种模态数据，而不依赖传统的视觉编码器。该架构简化了训练流程，降低了多模态模型的复杂度，为学术界和工业界提供了新的研究思路。对于大学生而言，这意味着未来可以基于更轻量、更易训练的模型开展多模态AI实验，同时该架构的公开也有助于学习最新的模型设计范式。
key_points: Google 发布无编码器多模态模型
Gemma 4 12B 统一处理文本与图像
简化训练流程，降低复杂度
为多模态研究提供新思路
适合学生实验与学习

must_read.title_cn: 苹果 App Store 销售额 1.4 万亿美元
must_read.title_en: Apple touts $1.4 trillion in App Store billings and sales, 90% without a commission
must_read.summary_cn: 苹果公布 App Store 促成 1.4 万亿美元销售额（含实体商品与服务），其中 90% 的交易不向苹果缴纳佣金。这一数据凸显了应用经济的规模以及苹果的生态策略。
must_read.summary_en: Apple reported $1.4 trillion in App Store billings and sales, with 90% of transactions not subject to its commission. This highlights the scale of the app economy and Apple’s ecosystem strategy.
must_read.student_note: 可关注 App Store 生态对开发者收入及商业模式的影响。
must_read.detail_summary: 苹果公司公布 App Store 促成了约1.4万亿美元的销售额，涵盖实体商品、数字服务等，其中高达90%的交易不向苹果缴纳佣金。这一数据凸显了应用经济的巨大规模，以及苹果通过严格审核与生态系统绑定所获得的间接收益。对于大学生开发者而言，这意味着应用市场仍有巨大机会，但需注意苹果的佣金策略可能影响收入，同时也要看到非付费交易区间的广阔前景。
key_points: App Store 促成1.4万亿美元销售额
90%交易不缴苹果佣金
应用经济规模庞大
生态策略带来间接收益
开发者需关注佣金政策

must_read.title_cn: xAI 暂停招聘 Grok 导师
must_read.title_en: Elon Musk’s xAI reportedly pauses hiring for Grok AI tutors — what’s going on behind the scenes?
must_read.summary_cn: 有消息称，马斯克的 xAI 公司暂停了 Grok AI 导师的招聘，外界猜测可能与成本控制或战略调整有关。具体原因尚未公开。
must_read.summary_en: Elon Musk’s xAI reportedly paused hiring for Grok AI tutors, prompting speculation about cost control or strategic shifts. No official explanation has been provided.
must_read.detail_summary: 据外媒报道，马斯克旗下的 xAI 公司已暂停招聘 Grok AI 导师，外界猜测可能与成本控制或战略调整有关，但官方未公布具体原因。此前Grok模型曾因幽默风格和实时信息获取受到关注，暂停导师招聘可能意味着模型训练方式或迭代策略发生变化。对于关注AI行业动态的大学生，这一事件反映了初创AI公司在扩张中面临的资源调配挑战。
key_points: xAI 暂停 Grok 导师招聘
原因未明，或与成本有关
可能涉及战略调整
反映AI初创公司资源压力
关注Grok后续迭代方向

must_read.title_cn: 马斯克 AI 野心隐性成本惊人
must_read.title_en: The Hidden Cost of Elon Musk’s AI Ambitions Is Bigger Than Most Public Companies
must_read.summary_cn: 文章指出，马斯克在 AI 领域的投入与隐形成本总额超过多数上市公司的市值，揭示了 AI 竞赛背后巨大的资金压力。
must_read.summary_en: The article argues that the hidden costs of Musk’s AI ambitions exceed the market value of most public companies, highlighting the immense financial pressure behind the AI race.
must_read.detail_summary: 分析文章指出，马斯克在AI领域的投入（包括xAI、特斯拉自动驾驶、Dojo超算等）总隐形成本已超过多数上市公司的市值，揭示了AI竞赛背后巨大的资金压力。除了直接研发成本，还包括电力、芯片采购、人才争夺及机会成本。这对大学生理解AI产业格局有重要参考价值：AI竞争不仅是技术比拼，更是资本与资源的较量，入行前需了解行业生态。
key_points: 马斯克AI投入总成本超多数上市公司
隐形成本包括电力、芯片、人才
AI竞赛是资金与资源较量
警示创业公司资金压力
帮助理解AI产业格局

must_read.title_cn: Endava 用 AI 代理重构软件交付
must_read.title_en: How Endava is redesigning software delivery around AI agents
must_read.summary_cn: Endava 利用 AI 代理（如 ChatGPT Enterprise 和 Codex）加速软件交付、自动化工作流，并打造 AI 原生的企业文化。这是企业级 AI 应用落地的典型案例。
must_read.summary_en: Endava is leveraging AI agents such as ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex to accelerate software delivery, automate workflows, and build an AI-native culture — a real-world example of enterprise AI adoption.
must_read.student_note: 推荐阅读，学习 AI 如何在软件工程中实际落地。
must_read.detail_summary: 外包与技术服务公司 Endava 在 OpenAI 博客中分享了利用 AI 代理（如 ChatGPT Enterprise 和 Codex）加速软件交付的实践。他们通过 AI 自动化工作流、辅助代码审查、生成测试用例，并致力于打造 AI 原生的企业文化。这是企业级 AI 落地的典型案例，展示了 AI 如何从工具升级为团队协作的一部分。对于计算机专业大学生，这提供了未来工作中可能采用的 AI 工作流模式，值得学习。
key_points: Endava 用 AI 代理加速软件交付
使用 ChatGPT Enterprise 与 Codex
自动化工作流与代码审查
打造 AI 原生企业文化
案例展示企业级AI应用落地

must_read.title_cn: 英国媒体近六成未披露国防关联
must_read.title_en: UK media fails to disclose defence sector links in nearly 60% of cases
must_read.summary_cn: 调查显示，英国近 60% 的相关报道未注明与国防部门的关系，引发对新闻独立性和透明度的担忧。
must_read.summary_en: An investigation found nearly 60% of UK media reports failed to disclose links to the defence sector, raising concerns about press independence and transparency.
must_read.detail_summary: 一项调查发现，英国近 60% 与国防相关的新闻报道未注明与国防部门的关系，这引发了对新闻独立性和透明度的担忧。该现象可能导致公众无法辨别内容是否受政府或军方影响。对于新闻传播或国际关系专业的大学生，这是一个重要的媒体伦理案例，提醒我们在阅读新闻时需注意信息来源和潜在利益冲突。
key_points: 近六成报道未披露国防关联
引发新闻独立性担忧
媒体透明度问题突出
提醒读者注意信息源
对媒体伦理有警示意义

must_read.title_cn: VSCode 漏洞可一键窃取 GitHub 令牌
must_read.title_en: 1-Click GitHub Token Stealing via a VSCode Bug
must_read.summary_cn: 安全研究人员发现 VSCode 存在漏洞，攻击者可通过恶意扩展一键窃取 GitHub 令牌。开发者应立即检查扩展安全性并更新。
must_read.summary_en: A security researcher discovered a VSCode bug that allows attackers to steal GitHub tokens with one click. Developers should review extension security and update immediately.
must_read.student_note: 推荐开发者检查 VSCode 扩展安全，及时更新。
must_read.detail_summary: 安全研究人员发现 VSCode 存在一个漏洞，攻击者可以通过恶意扩展在用户系统中一键窃取 GitHub 令牌，进而获取代码仓库访问权限。该漏洞影响广泛使用的开发环境，开发人员应立即检查已安装扩展的安全性并及时更新。对于计算机专业大学生，尤其是频繁使用 VSCode 的开发者，养成审查扩展来源与权限的习惯至关重要。
key_points: VSCode 漏洞可窃取 GitHub 令牌
恶意扩展是一键攻击入口
影响代码仓库安全
开发者需立即检查扩展
养成安全使用工具习惯

must_read.title_cn: Altman 承认 AI Token 成本成巨大问题
must_read.title_en: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman admits AI token costs are becoming 'a huge issue' — company seeks improved value as overspending becomes a meme
must_read.summary_cn: OpenAI 首席执行官 Sam Altman 承认，AI 推理中的 token 成本已成为巨大挑战，公司正在寻求提高性价比。过度花费甚至成为网络热梗。
must_read.summary_en: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman admitted that token costs in AI inference have become a huge issue, and the company is working to improve value. Overspending has even become a meme.
must_read.student_note: 关注 AI 成本问题，有助于理解 API 定价趋势和商业模型。
must_read.detail_summary: OpenAI 首席执行官 Sam Altman 公开承认，AI 推理过程中的 token 成本已成为巨大挑战，公司正在努力寻找提高性价比的方法。这一成本问题甚至成为网络热梗，反映出开源社区对AI高昂使用费的调侃。对于大学生来说，这意味着使用大模型API时需关注成本，同时可通过优化提示词、使用缓存等技巧降低开销；也启示了未来AI基础设施优化的方向。
key_points: Altman 承认 Token 成本是巨大问题
OpenAI 寻求提高性价比
成本问题成为网络热梗
提示优化可降低开销
AI基础设施优化方向

must_read.title_cn: 首相支持女议员起诉 xAI 侵犯隐私
must_read.title_en: PM backs female MP for suing xAI over bikini photo
must_read.summary_cn: 一位女性议员因 xAI 未经授权使用其泳装照片而起诉，首相公开支持。案件涉及 AI 生成内容与个人名誉权。
must_read.summary_en: A female MP is suing xAI over unauthorized use of her bikini photo, with the Prime Minister publicly backing her. The case touches on AI-generated content and personal reputation.
must_read.detail_summary: 一位女性议员因 xAI 未经授权使用其泳装照片而在社交媒体上起诉，英国首相公开表示支持。该案件涉及AI生成内容对个人形象和名誉权的侵犯，以及数据隐私法规的适用性。对于大学生，尤其是法律和传媒相关专业，这是一个关于AI与隐私权的典型案例，值得深入探讨AI训练数据的合法性和个体权利保护。
key_points: 女议员起诉 xAI 使用其照片
首相公开支持诉讼
涉及AI隐私与名誉权
案例引发AI监管讨论
关注数据合法性与个体权利

must_read.title_en: Artificial intelligence is not conscious – Ted Chiang
must_read.summary_cn: 著名科幻作家特德·姜在《大西洋月刊》撰文，系统论证当前 AI 并不具备意识，驳斥了“AI 有意识”的观点。文章对理解 AI 本质有启发。
must_read.summary_en: Acclaimed sci-fi author Ted Chiang argues in The Atlantic that current AI is not conscious, pushing back against claims of AI sentience. The piece offers a critical perspective on AI nature.
must_read.student_note: 推荐阅读，培养对 AI 本质的批判性思维。
must_read.detail_summary: 著名科幻作家特德·姜在《大西洋月刊》发表长文，系统性地论证当前AI系统并不具备意识。他驳斥了“AI有意识”的观点，指出大型语言模型只是模式匹配与文本生成，缺乏主观体验和自我意识。这篇文章对于理解AI本质具有重要启发，尤其适合哲学、计算机科学以及AI相关专业的大学生，帮助厘清技术现状与公众误解。
key_points: 特德·姜论证AI没有意识
驳回“AI有意识”观点
AI仅是模式匹配与文本生成
帮助理解AI本质
适合学生深入思考

must_read.title_cn: Uber 每月 AI 使用上限 1500 美元
must_read.title_en: Uber's $1,500/month AI limit is a useful signal for AI tool pricing
must_read.summary_cn: Uber 对 AI 工具（如 Claude Code）设定了每月 1500 美元的使用上限，以控制成本。这一案例为企业 AI 工具定价提供了参考信号。
must_read.summary_en: Uber capped monthly usage of AI tools like Claude Code at $1,500 to control costs. This provides a useful data point for understanding enterprise AI tool pricing.
must_read.student_note: 关注企业 AI 成本管理，对产品定价策略有启发。
must_read.detail_summary: 据Hacker News报道，Uber 对 AI 工具（如 Claude Code）设定了每月1500美元的使用上限，以控制企业 AI 成本。这一做法为企业级 AI 工具的定价和预算管理提供了参考信号。对于大学生，尤其是未来可能参与企业技术决策的学生，需要了解 AI 服务成本管理的实际案例，避免盲目使用导致预算超支。
key_points: Uber 设定AI工具月上限1500美元
旨在控制企业AI成本
为AI服务定价提供参考
企业需合理规划AI预算
未来职场技能启示

must_read.summary_cn: 微软推出 MAI-Code-1-Flash 模型，专注于代码生成任务。该模型可能为开发者提供更快速的代码补全与生成能力。
must_read.summary_en: Microsoft released MAI-Code-1-Flash, a model focused on code generation. It promises faster code completion and generation for developers.
must_read.student_note: 推荐阅读，了解最新代码生成模型的发展。
must_read.detail_summary: 微软发布了名为 MAI-Code-1-Flash 的模型，专注于代码生成任务，可能为开发者提供更快速的代码补全、生成与修复能力。该模型延续了微软在代码AI领域的布局，有望提升开发者的编程效率。对于计算机专业大学生，该模型可能成为学习编程和加速项目开发的得力工具，建议关注后续API或集成情况。
key_points: 微软发布 MAI-Code-1-Flash
专注于代码生成任务
提升代码补全与生成效率
延续微软代码AI布局
开发者可关注集成与使用

must_read.title_cn: 伯克利 CS 课程因 AI 作弊不及格率飙升
must_read.title_en: Failing grades soar with AI usage, dwindling math skills in Berkeley CS classes
must_read.summary_cn: 加州大学伯克利分校的计算机科学课程中，因学生滥用 AI 作弊导致不及格率大幅上升，同时数学能力下降。文章警示 AI 对教育的负面影响。
must_read.summary_en: At UC Berkeley, CS classes saw a surge in failing grades due to students cheating with AI, alongside declining math skills. The report warns of AI's negative impact on education.
must_read.student_note: 提醒大学生合理使用 AI，避免学术不端。
must_read.detail_summary: 加州大学伯克利分校的计算机科学课程中，因学生滥用AI作弊导致不及格率大幅上升，同时数学能力显著下降。文章警示AI工具对教育评价体系的冲击，以及学生过度依赖AI而忽略基础能力培养的问题。对于大学生来说，这是一个警钟：AI是辅助工具，不能替代独立思考和学习。合理使用AI才能真正提升技能。
key_points: 伯克利CS课程因AI作弊不及格率飙升
学生数学能力下降
AI滥用冲击教育评价体系
警示学生勿依赖AI代替学习
合理使用AI提升技能

must_read.title_cn: DeepMind 高管警告：新人类时代将至
must_read.title_en: Google DeepMind CEO says we don't have much time to prepare for the 'new human era'
must_read.summary_cn: DeepMind 首席执行官 Demis Hassabis 表示，人类需要迅速为即将到来的“新人类时代”做好准备，暗示 AGI 临近。
must_read.summary_en: Google DeepMind CEO Demis Hassabis warns that humanity has little time to prepare for the coming 'new human era', signaling the near approach of AGI.
must_read.detail_summary: DeepMind 首席执行官 Demis Hassabis 发出警告，称人类需要迅速为即将到来的“新人类时代”做好准备，暗示通用人工智能（AGI）的来临可能比预期更快。他强调社会、教育、伦理等多方面都需要提前调整。对于大学生，尤其是AI相关专业学生，这一言论意味着未来几年行业将发生深刻变革，需持续学习并思考AGI对就业、社会的影响。
key_points: DeepMind CEO 警告新人类时代将至
暗示AGI临近
需要社会与教育提前准备
对AI从业者有深远影响
关注AGI带来的变革

must_read.title_cn: 将 Nvidia 显存用作 Linux 交换空间
must_read.title_en: Use your Nvidia GPU's VRAM as swap space on Linux
must_read.summary_cn: 一篇技术教程介绍了如何在 Linux 系统中将 Nvidia GPU 的显存（VRAM）用作交换空间，以扩展可用内存，适合有 GPU 的开发者和学生。
must_read.summary_en: A tutorial explains how to use Nvidia GPU VRAM as swap space on Linux, effectively expanding available memory. Useful for developers and students with GPUs.
must_read.student_note: 推荐有 GPU 的同学了解，提升资源利用效率。
must_read.detail_summary: 一篇技术教程介绍了如何在 Linux 系统中将 Nvidia GPU 的显存（VRAM）用作交换空间，从而扩展可用内存。对于拥有GPU但内存有限的开发者和大学生，这提供了一种利用闲置显存提升系统性能的实用技巧。不过需注意显存交换的延迟与磨损问题，适合有一定Linux基础的用户尝试。
key_points: 将Nvidia显存用作Linux交换空间
扩展可用内存
利用闲置GPU资源
适合有GPU的学生实践
注意延迟与硬件磨损
